data.title: Advanced Phishing Protection
data.description: Google's security incorporates advanced anti-phishing technology to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models trained on vast data sets to detect phishing patterns.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Robust encryption practices to secure user information both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL protocols for data in transit, AES encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Adoption of a Zero Trust approach to ensure maximum security.
data.technical_spec: Verification of identity and context across applications, users, and devices.

data.title: Continuous Security Monitoring
data.description: Real-time monitoring and anomaly detection to identify threats quickly.
data.technical_spec: Custom-built solutions coupled with off-the-shelf monitoring tools.

data.title: SOC and Threat Intelligence
data.description: Dedicated Security Operations Center (SOC) and threat intelligence analytics.
data.technical_spec: Integration of global threat intelligence feeds and internal data analytics.
